productDisplayName: Levis Men Argyle Flat Knit Crew Grey Pack of 3 Socks
description: Set of three Levi's socks With a supportive Fit and crafted from soft cotton, these crew socks from Levi's make for a great buy with their tonal stripes. And what better way to enhance your comfort level three-fold than with this tri-pack of socks in black, navy blue and grey! Made of soft cotton for a secure fit and exemplary comfort Spandex in welt for enhanced grip Arch support for good grip and a customised fit Cushioned footbed for absolute shock absorption and enhanced comfort Breathable mesh sole Softly elasticated broad ankle welt to ensure a soft grip Brand name printed on the ribbed cuff Sock care Machine wash in warm water using a mild detergent Use non-chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low in a delicate cycle Do not iron
